title: Exercise Classes/Groups * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Exercise Classes/Groups * Older Adults 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ASHLAND SENIOR SERVICES DIVISION AND ASHLAND SENIOR CENTER SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and referral services and application assistance for Ashland senior utility and internet discounts and other public benefits. Offers RVTD bus and Valley Lift passes, caregiver resources, a library, a small food pantry, and assistance accessing food resources. Onsite volunteers provide help with advance directives and tutoring for computers, phones, and other devices. Offers exercise classes, social activities, special events, and a newsletter. 1699 Homes Avenue Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Age 50 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-3:30pm Email (541) 488-5342 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CARECONNECT USA ZUMBA GOLD VIRTUAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides live, virtual Zumba classes endowed by the AARP. 2019 Sandy Pond Lane Waxhaw, NC 28173 Eligibility: Unrestricted, however classes are generally for older adults Hours: Monday, Wednesday, Friday 8am-9am Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details ASHLAND SENIOR SERVICES DIVISION AND ASHLAND SENIOR CENTER SENIOR SERVICES
